context.audience: Growth-focused developers building pages at scale, indie hackers creating niche content sites, marketing engineers automating SEO content production pipelines
pain_points: Generating unique, high-quality content at scale without triggering spam filters
Building scalable page templates that rank for long-tail keywords
Managing data sources and keeping programmatically generated pages fresh
Internal linking strategies that distribute authority across thousands of pages
Measuring and iterating on programmatic page performance at scale
monetization: Affiliate and ad revenue from content sites
content_that_works: Programmatic SEO case studies and teardowns
